MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF PLAINTIFF'S FIRST THROUGH SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION AND PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES:
APPEAR: Todd M. Schneider, Esq. & Carolyn H. Cottrell, Esq. 440-3440 for pltf & opposing party; Gilmore F. Diekmann, Jr., Esq. 397-2823 for deft & moving party Walgreen Co.; Tyree P. Jones, Jr., Esq. 439-4814 for deft Andrew Kanegson.
RULING: Argued and the Court denied the motion for summary adjudication by Walgreens as to sexual harrassment and racial harrassment, and granted the motion for summary adjudication as to gender discrimination, racial discrimination, retaliation and punitive damages. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
